8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_MESH_EXPORTERS_IXM4_IXMDATANODE_H_
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_MESH_EXPORTERS_IXM4_IXMDATANODE_H_
10 
11 #include <arcane/CommonVariables.h>
12 #include "arcane/XmlNode.h"
13 #include <arcane/utils/Array.h>
14 #include <arcane/utils/NotSupportedException.h>
15 #include <arcane/utils/StringBuilder.h>
16 
17 #include "IXMValues.h"
18 #include "IXMValuesXML.h"
19 #include "IXMValuesHDF.h"
20 
21 using namespace Arcane;
22 
23 
24 template<typename T>
25 class IXMDataNode {
26 
28  enum eReturnType
29  {
30  RTOk,
31  RTError,
37  RTIrrelevant
38  };
39  enum eFormatType {
40  IXM_FORMAT_XML,
41  IXM_FORMAT_HDF
42  };
43 
44 
45 public:
46  IXMDataNode();
47 
48  IXMDataNode(XmlNode& parent_node, const String& format, const String& data_type, const String& directory_name, const Integer array_size=-1);
49 
50  virtual ~IXMDataNode();
51 
53  eFormatType getFormat() const { return m_format;};
54 
56  void setFormat(const eFormatType& format) { m_format=format;};
57 
59  // IXMValues * getValues(IXMValues *);
60 
62  //Int32 update();
63 
65  Int32 build(Array<T>& array);
66 
68  Int32 getSize(){return m_size;};
69 
71  Int32 setSize(Int64 size){return m_size=size;};
72 
74  XmlNode getDataNode() {return m_data_node;};
75 
77  Int32 getFormat(){return m_format;}
78 
80  void setHeavyDataName(const String& hdata_name) {m_heavy_data_name=hdata_name;};
81 
83  String getHeavyDataName() const {return m_heavy_data_name;};
84 
86  XmlElement createFromParent( XmlNode& parent_node, const String& format, const String& type, const Integer array_size);
87 
88 
89 public:
90  XmlNode m_data_node;
91 
92 protected:
94  Int32 checkValues(Int32 format);
96  //Int32 updateInfos();
97 
98 protected:
99  eFormatType m_format;
100  Int32 m_array_is_mine;
101 // Int32 m_type; // ? not used
102  Int32 m_size;
103 
104  IXMValues<T> *m_values;
105  String m_heavy_data_name;
106  String m_directory_name;
107 };
108 
109 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_MESH_EXPORTERS_IXM4_IXMDATANODE_H_ */
110 
111 
112 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
113 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
114 template<typename T>
115 IXMDataNode<T>::IXMDataNode() {
116  // TODO Auto-generated constructor stub
117 
118 }
119 
120 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
121 template<typename T>
122 IXMDataNode<T>::IXMDataNode(XmlNode& parent_node, const String& format, const String& data_type, const String& directory_name, const Integer array_size)
123  : m_data_node(this->createFromParent(parent_node, format, data_type,array_size))
124  , m_format((format == "xml")?IXM_FORMAT_XML:IXM_FORMAT_HDF)
125  , m_array_is_mine(1)
126  , m_size(0)
127  , m_values(NULL)
128  //m_array = NULL;
129  , m_heavy_data_name()
130  , m_directory_name(directory_name)
131 {}
132 
133 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
134 template<typename T>
135 IXMDataNode<T>::~IXMDataNode() {
136  // TODO Auto-generated destructor stub
137  if(this->m_values) delete this->m_values;
138 }
139 
140 
141 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
142 
143 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
144 template<typename T>
145 Int32
146 IXMDataNode<T>::checkValues(Int32 format){
147  if(this->m_values){
148  // Exists
149  if(this->m_format != format){
150  // Wrong Format
151  //debug() << "CheckValues Changing Format";
152  delete this->m_values;
153  this->m_values = NULL;
154  }
155  }
156  if(!this->m_values){
157  // Create One of the Proper Format
158  switch (this->m_format) {
159  case IXM_FORMAT_HDF :
160  this->m_values = new IXMValuesHDF<T>(m_directory_name);
161  break;
162  case IXM_FORMAT_XML :
163  this->m_values = new IXMValuesXML<T>();
164  break;
165  default :
166  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, "Unsupported Data Format");
167  return(RTError);
168  }
169  }
170  if(!this->m_values){
171  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, "Error Creating new XdmfValues");
172  return(RTError);
173  }
174 
175  return(RTOk);
176 }
177 
178 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
179 /*template<typename T>
180 Int32 IXMDataNode<T>::updateInfos(){
181 
182  String value = m_data_node.attrValue("format");
183  // Currently XML or HDF5
184  if(value == "hdf"){
185  this->setFormat(IXM_FORMAT_HDF);
186  } else if(value == "hdf5"){
187  this->setFormat(IXM_FORMAT_HDF);
188  } else if(value == "h5"){
189  this->setFormat(IXM_FORMAT_HDF);
190  } else if(value == "xml"){
191  this->setFormat(IXM_FORMAT_XML);
192  }else if(value.null()){
193  throw NotSupportedException(A_FUNCINFO, "Unsupported data format");
194  return(RTError);
195  }
196  return(RTOk);
197 }*/
198 
199 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
200 template<typename T>
201 XmlElement
202 IXMDataNode<T>::createFromParent( XmlNode& parent_node, const String& format, const String& type, const Integer array_size){
203  XmlElement data_node(parent_node,"data");
204  data_node.setAttrValue("format",format);
205  data_node.setAttrValue("type", type);
206  if (array_size != -1) { // la variable est de type tableau
207  StringBuilder str_builder;
208  str_builder += array_size;
209  data_node.setAttrValue("array-size",str_builder.toString());
210  }
211  return(data_node);
212 }
213 
214 
215 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
216 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
217 
218 // Supported ixm Formats
219 #include "IXMValuesXML.h"
220 #include "IXMValuesHDF.h"
221 
222 
223 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
224 template<typename T>
225 Int32
226 IXMDataNode<T>::build(Array<T>& array){
227 
228  if(this->checkValues(this->m_format) != RTOk){
229  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, "Error Accessing Internal IXMValues");
230  return(RTError);
231  }
232  // don't need switch case here, because m_values is already built
233  // just useful in debug mode to print appropriate messages according to formt type
234  m_values->setDataNode(this->m_data_node);
235 
236  switch (this->m_format) {
237  case IXM_FORMAT_HDF :
238  //debug() << "Writing Values in HDF Format";
239  m_values->setHeavyDataName(this->getHeavyDataName());
240  //if(!((IXMValuesHDF *)m_values)->write(array)){
241  if(!(m_values)->write(array)){
242  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Writing Values Failed");
243  return(RTError);
244  }
245  break;
246  case IXM_FORMAT_XML :
247  //debug() << "Writing Values in XML Format";
248  //if(!((IXMValuesXML *)m_values)->write(array)){
249  if(!(m_values)->write(array)){
250  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, "Writing Values Failed");
251  return(RTError);
252  }
253  break;
254  default :
255  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, "Unsupported Data Format");
256  return(RTError);
257  }
258  return(RTOk);
259 }
260 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
IXMDataNode

IXMDataNode::setFormat
void setFormat(const eFormatType &format)
Set the format of the data. Usually XML | HDF. Default is XML.
